top3.sql:
SELECT 
    d_year,
    i_category_id,
    i_category,
    SUM(ss_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales,
    LAG(SUM(ss_ext_sales_price), 12) OVER (PARTITION BY i_category_id ORDER BY d_year, i_category_id) AS prev_year_sales,
    (SUM(ss_ext_sales_price) - LAG(SUM(ss_ext_sales_price), 12) OVER (PARTITION BY i_category_id ORDER BY d_year, i_category_id)) / 
        NULLIF(LAG(SUM(ss_ext_sales_price), 12) OVER (PARTITION BY i_category_id ORDER BY d_year, i_category_id), 0) ASYoY_growth
FROM store_sales...
